explanations.9: This URL points to a local machine on your network where the Ollama service is running; it's the address the application will contact to access the AI model.
explanations.26: These settings override the model's default behavior for this specific configuration, letting you control how creative or focused the responses should be.
explanations.37: This delay in milliseconds prevents the autocomplete feature from making too many requests while you're typing, giving the system time to wait between keystroke events.
